title: Campus Active Directory - Requesting a new Organizational Unit (OU) or changes to OU administrator accounts
body: Requests are submitted through the Organizational Unit Requests form (UW-Madison login required). Forms should be submitted by the IT manager who is ultimately responsible for the OU. One request can be submitted at a time. Once the form is submitted, requests are tracked and managed through a ticketing system. The CADS team generally addresses requests within 3-5 business days. If an OU administrator account needs to be disabled immediately, please contact the CADS team directly after completing the form.
